arts.ttl: Preview: Fulham vs. Newcastle United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Premier League clash between Fulham and Newcastle United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Fulham lineup vs. Newcastle: Predicted XI for Premier League clash
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Fulham could line up for Saturday's Premier League clash with Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: 'I know this sounds silly': Paul Merson makes interesting Tottenham and Newcastle claim
arts.sum: Paul Merson claims that Tottenham Hotspur have played better than Newcastle United this season, despite the Magpies being unbeaten.

arts.ttl: Newcastle weighing up move for talented teenage star valued at £21m
arts.sum: Newcastle are tracking talented FC Nordsjaelland forward Sindre Walle Egeli according to Mail Sport journalist Craig Hope. The Magpies endured a disappointing summer window in which they failed to make a marquee signing after being unable to complete a deal for their number on target Marc Guehi. Despite this Eddie Howe’s side have made a […] The post Newcastle weighing up move for talented teenage star valued at £21m appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle’s plan to ward off Arsenal and Liverpool interest in England star
arts.sum: Newcastle have a plan to ensure that Anthony Gordon stays at the club amid interest from Arsenal and Liverpool, according to the latest reports. The outlet reports that: "Newcastle will offer to make Anthony Gordon their highest earner on a deal worth close to £9million per season as they try to convince him to stay."

arts.ttl: 'Fortunate' Newcastle United warned they are in five-team fight for one Champions League place
arts.sum: Paul Merson says he cannot back Newcastle for UEFA Champions League qualification despite an impressive start to the season. However, the former Arsenal, Middlesbrough, and Aston Villa midfielder turned pundit does not fancy the Magpies to continue the form moving forward despite winnable fixtures against Fulham, Everton, and Brighton to come albeit a home match against Manchester City sandwiched in between.

arts.ttl: Lewis Hall 'holes' questioned by Newcastle United legend after Wolves lapse
arts.sum: Former Republic of Ireland international Anderson told BBC Radio Newcastle: "I have doubts about him from a defensive point of view. Newcastle United pundit John Anderson has revealed he has concerns over Lewis Hall's suitability as a left-back - and wonders whether his future may lie further up the pitch.

arts.ttl: Newcastle midfielder makes transfer decision ahead of contract expiry
arts.sum: Newcastle United are relaxed about the future of Sean Longstaff. After joining their youth academy over 20 years ago, the 26-year-old midfielder has been with the Magpies his entire career. One of the club’s own, Longstaff is a fan-favourite and a well-respected member of Eddie Howe’s squad. Despite his loyalty though, there have been questions […] The post Newcastle midfielder makes transfer decision ahead of contract expiry appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'No one tries to hit you' - Joelinton thankful for Newcastle United behaviour after 'worst period' - Chronicle Live
arts.sum: “I’ve been through Newcastle’s worst period, and I don’t think the pressure is the same as in Brazil,” Joelinton told UOL . “If the team is doing badly, you don’t go to a party or anything like that, the player has to be respectful too.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United share Liverpool's Trent Alexander-Arnold problem as new team selection awaits - John Gibson
arts.sum: What is a fascinating by-product of Newcastle United at the moment is their young defenders Tino Livramento and Lewis Hall. I doubt if many Geordies expected the three team changes Eddie Howe revealed at Wolves _ while most thought Sandro Tonali would start ahead of Sean Longstaff the boss instead dropped Harvey Barnes for Jacob Murphy, Kelly for Hall and more predictably Emil Krafth for Fabian Schar.
